name: kramar-studio-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting Kramar IT Studio role plugins (product, ops, security). Companion to archforge-marketplace; same methodology, different roles.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product management toolkit: market-scan (rare) + per-feature cycle Discover → Define → Spec → Validate, with prioritize over backlog. Artifacts (HYP/PRD/SPEC/VAL/SCAN) cross-link to ADRs from archforge.
